system.description: Magical silver slippers worn by Dorothea (OZena) that grant extraordinary mobility powers. The wearer can move through folds in space, disappearing and reappearing in a flash. Can teleport freely up to 30 feet without anyone preventing movement, but must be able to see the point of arrival. Once per Scene, can take a longer journey and reappear in any place previously seen at least once. These magical shoes are famous from the second witch Johanne that OZena killed.
